  • Classes in grafiosch.exceptions used by grafiosch.exceptions
    Class
    Description
    DataViolation
    Represents a single data validation violation with localization support.
  • Classes in grafiosch.exceptions used by grafiosch.rest.helper
    Class
    Description
    DataViolationException
    Runtime exception for collecting and reporting multiple data validation violations.
    GeneralNotTranslatedWithArgumentsException
    Runtime exception for deferred message translation when user locale is not accessible.
    LimitEntityTransactionException
    Runtime exception thrown when entity transaction limits are exceeded.
    RequestLimitAndSecurityBreachException
     
    ResourceNotFoundException
    Indicates that an entity referenced by a client request does not exist.

    Class
    Description
    RequestLimitAndSecurityBreachException

    Description

    Checked exception for background task execution failures with transaction control.
